title: Entry Card Overlay Polish + Upload
description: Polish the entry card overlay and add material upload capability.

stories.title: Entry card gets dark backdrop and blocks canvas interaction
stories.description: The entry card overlay needs three fixes: (1) Add a semi-opaque dark backdrop (bg-black/70 or similar) behind the entry card so the canvas beneath is dimmed and the form text is readable. (2) The backdrop must intercept mouse wheel events so scrolling does not pan/zoom the canvas while the entry card is showing. Add onWheel={e => e.stopPropagation()} to the overlay wrapper. (3) The backdrop must intercept click events so clicking outside the entry card does not interact with the canvas. The entry card itself should have a subtle border and slightly elevated look (e.g. border border-primary/20 bg-black/90 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-8). The overlay container should be pointer-events-auto and cover the full viewport area of the studio shell.
acceptanceCriteria: Entry card has a dark semi-opaque backdrop behind it
Canvas is visually dimmed when entry card is showing
Mouse wheel does NOT zoom/pan the canvas while entry card is visible
Clicking outside the entry card does NOT interact with canvas elements
Entry card text is easily readable against the dark backdrop
dev-browser verification: check backdrop exists, scroll does not move canvas, entry card text contrast is sufficient

stories.title: Add material upload button to entry card
stories.description: Add an Upload Materials button or drop zone to the entry card so users can add new materials for the selected course without leaving the setup flow. The Source Shelf already has upload wired via handleUploadSourceShelfFiles in TutorShell.tsx -- reuse that same handler. Add a file input (hidden) + styled Upload button below the material checklist. When files are selected, call the same upload handler. Show upload progress indicator (isUploading state already exists as sourceShelfUploading). After upload completes, the material list should refresh to include the newly uploaded files. Style the upload button as a dashed-border outlined area: border-dashed border-[rgba(255,118,144,0.25)] rounded-lg p-3 text-center cursor-pointer hover:bg-primary/5. Show a cloud-upload icon or text like 'Upload New Materials' with 'PDF, DOCX, MP4, PPTX' as accepted types.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload button or drop zone is visible on the entry card below the material list
Clicking upload opens a file picker dialog
Accepted file types include PDF, DOCX, MP4, PPTX
Upload progress indicator shows while uploading
After upload completes, new materials appear in the checklist
Upload is scoped to the selected course
dev-browser verification: check upload button exists, is clickable

stories.title: Rename Open Full Studio button and clean up Resume logic
stories.description: The 'Open Full Studio' button is confusing for users. Rename it to 'Skip Setup' since it just opens all panels without the priming workflow. Also, the Resume button should only show when there is a real resumable session (resumeCandidate must have a valid session with actual progress, not just any test data). If there is no meaningful session to resume, hide the button entirely.
acceptanceCriteria: Button text reads 'Skip Setup' instead of 'Open Full Studio'
Resume button only shows when resumeCandidate is truthy
dev-browser verification: check button text is 'Skip Setup'
